name: Tiny
description: My enemies break upon me like surf upon the stone.

abilities.name: Insurmountable
abilities.description: Grants bonus status resistance and bonus slow resistance per current.

abilities.name: Avalanche
abilities.description: Stuns and deals damage over time to enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Toss
abilities.description: Grants flat bonus Toss spell damage per Grow level. The Toss bonus spell damage from is not affected by the landing damage factor.

abilities.name: Tree Grab
abilities.description: Wields a tree as a weapon for a limited number of attacks. Grants Tiny bonus attack range, and a psuedo-cleave attack effect until the tree is thrown. Wielding the tree grants a flat attack damage bonus while attacking enemy units.

abilities.name: Tree Volley
abilities.description: Tiny channels to throw random trees within the radius towards the area-targeted location. Deals damage correspondingly to Tiny's attack damage upon per tree impact while applying various attack effects.

abilities.name: Grow
abilities.description: Gains craggy mass, increasing his attack damage, and armor while slowing his total attack speed. Grants flat bonus Toss spell damage per level.
